positive: A stylish, abstract watercolor illustration depicting a group of highly stylized, interconnected botanical elements and gentle wildlife silhouettes. Center composition. Key subjects include gracefully curved peacock feathers, interwoven eucalyptus leaves, delicate fern fronds, and abstract hummingbirds in flight. The color palette should be soft, yet vibrant: deep sapphire blues, dusty sage greens, warm burnt orange accents, and creamy ivory washes. The style is modern whimsical folk art, rendered with clean, defined watercolor edges and limited gradients for maximum print contrast. The background must be a solid, clean off-white wash. Focus on symmetry and dynamic flow. Vector-graphic quality finish, suitable for repeating apparel prints.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low resolution, artifacts, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, disfigured, cartoon, realistic photograph, deep shadows, messy background
